basics.label: 10+ years in Energy Storage System development
basics.summary: Relying on a multidisciplinary profile with a broad range of knowledge and a detail oriented mindset, I have a particular taste for tackling challenging technical problems. Basing myself on a strong analytics skillset in various maths, physics and chemistry fields, I thrive on pushing the boundaries of my work.
